Text[0]: You have obtained a <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>master recipe book<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>. To learn the advanced recipes contained within, simply use the book in your inventory. The recipes will then appear under the <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Master<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> category of your crafting log.

You have obtained a <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>master recipe book<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>. To learn the advanced recipes contained within, simply use the book in your inventory. The recipes will then appear under the <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Master Recipes<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> category of your crafting log.

Recipes under the <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Special Recipes<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> category of the crafting log are used primarily to craft items required when progressing through certain quests and duties.

Among these recipes are items that are not recorded in the crafting log, and will therefore not grant an experience points bonus when crafted for the first time.
The crafting log's filter settings can be used to view only those recipes that will be recorded when crafted.
Be advised, however, these recipes are more complex than others of a comparable level, with higher requirements to craft. Practice and planning is highly recommended before challenging these recipes.
